text: William Shakespeare was a renowned English poet, playwright, and actor born on April 23rd, 1564 in Stratford-upon-Avon. Shakespeare was a prolific writer during the Elizabethan and Jacobean ages of British theatre. John Shakespeare married Mary Arden, and together they had eight children, the eldest being William. When he was eighteen, Shakespeare married Anne Hathaway. Shakespeare's career jump-started in London, when his first printed works were published. They were two long poems, 'Venus and Adonis' (1593) and 'The Rape of Lucrece' (1594). He became a founding member of The Lord Chamberlain’s Men, a company of actors. Shakespeare was the company's regular dramatist, producing on average two plays a year, for almost twenty years. Altogether Shakespeare's works include 38 plays, 2 narrative poems, 154 sonnets, and a variety of other poems. =--------------------------------------------------------------------- William Shakespeare, born on April 23, 1564, in Stratford-upon-Avon, was a renowned English poet, playwright, and actor. The eldest of John and Mary Shakespeare's eight children, he married Anne Hathaway at eighteen. Shakespeare's career flourished in London with the publication of his poems 'Venus and Adonis' (1593) and 'The Rape of Lucrece' (1594). A founding member of The Lord Chamberlain’s Men, he was their regular dramatist, producing around two plays a year for nearly twenty years. His works include 38 plays, 2 narrative poems, 154 sonnets, and various other poems, marking him as a prolific writer of the Elizabethan and Jacobean eras.
